creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 163416
patch to update math/rkward-kde4 to 0.6.3

What this update should do:

- update from 0.6.2 to 0.6.3
- new MASTERSITE in the KDE project
- USES=shared-mime-info
- pet portlint with 'make makepatch'
- update homepage in pkg-descr
- update pkg-plist


Testruns with Poudriere (HEAD, 10.2, 9.3 all amd64 and 9.3 i368) all build and install fine.


'portlint -AC' gives a warning for maintainer mode:
WARN: Makefile: [78]: possible direct use of command "install" found. use ${INSTALL_foobaa} instead.
